battleTraits.name: Bullstomper
battleTraits.effect: Your general has the HERO keyword (in addition to the MONSTER keyword) but does not have the REINFORCEMENTS keyword or icon.

battleTraits.name: Bellowing Roar
battleTraits.effect: Pick a friendly unit, pick an enemy unit in combat with it, roll a dice. On a 2+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks made by the target unit this phase.

battleTraits.name: Grab Those Rocks and Chuck 'Em!
battleTraits.effect: Pick your general, then pick another friendly unit wholly within 12". Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit's 'Throwin' Rocks' this turn.

enhancements.name: Monstrously Tough
enhancements.effect: Your general has a Health characteristic of 15 instead of 12.

enhancements.name: Extra-Big Bag
enhancements.effect: When your general uses 'Stuff 'Em In Me Bag', you can pick 2 enemy units instead of 1 (roll for each).

enhancements.name: Lanky Git
enhancements.effect: When you make a charge roll for your general, roll 3D6 instead of 2D6.

enhancements.name: Furiously Territorial
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by your general that target an enemy unit contesting an objective you do not control.

regimentAbilities.name: Foe-Chompers
regimentAbilities.effect: Each time an enemy model is slain by a friendly unit's 'Stuff 'Em In Me Bag' ability, Heal (D3) that unit.

regimentAbilities.name: Earth-Shaking Charge
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Phase (Army), Any Charge Phase
regimentAbilities.effect: Pick a friendly unit that charged this phase. Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with it. On a 3+, that enemy unit has STRIKE-LAST this turn.

abilities.name: Stuff 'Em In Me Bag
abilities.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit. Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target's Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.

abilities.name: Timber!
abilities.effect: If this model is slain, before removing it, players roll off. Winner picks a point up to 3" from this model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 2" of that point.

abilities.name: Stuff 'Em In Me Bag
abilities.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit. Roll a dice. If the roll is at least double the target's Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.

abilities.name: Timber!
abilities.effect: If this model is slain, before removing it, players roll off. Winner picks a point up to 3" from this model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 2" of that point.
